summary: This packet specializes in the credential/training architecture of a Russian-counterintelligence-focused CIA candidacy, assembled from a conversation in which the user explicitly rejected cyber/AI as primary tracks and insisted on non-coding preparation.
final_use_case: It links regional knowledge to analytic method by preserving source lineage, strategic frame, adversary logic, and claim limits for later Russia/security work.
